records.affiliate_or_sales_path: Direct digital product, configured implementation, automation installation, and managed support
records.target_buyer: Independent technicians, mechanics, MSPs, low-voltage contractors, hauling operators, installers, and small field-service companies
records.pain_solved: Incomplete intake, missing site photos, weak authorization records, inconsistent closeout, lost follow-ups, and scattered job documentation
records.estimated_commission_or_price: $49-$99 template pack; $249-$499 configured system; $750-$1,500 implementation; $99-$299 monthly support
records.cost_required: $0 new cash spend using existing assets
records.content_angle: Show a QR code and mobile workflow from intake through closeout and follow-up
risk_flags: Do not market as legal advice or guaranteed protection
records.recommended_action: Finalize ten proof-of-work forms, screenshots, packaging, and direct-sale landing-page assets
records.notes: Primary owned monetization asset and implementation-service feeder. Internal build authorized; public sale remains approval-gated.

records.source: Jobber partner and affiliate program research
records.target_buyer: Home-service contractors, electricians, handymen, cleaners, junk removal companies, construction and landscaping businesses
records.pain_solved: Scheduling, quoting, invoicing, CRM, client communication, and job management
records.content_angle: How small contractors organize dispatch, quotes, and job closeout
risk_flags: Do not claim partner status before acceptance
records.recommended_action: Complete internal field-service workflow comparison and prepare application package
records.notes: Strong external SaaS fit for the existing Already Here field-service audience.

records.source: Make affiliate and solution partner program research
records.product_or_offer_name: Make Affiliate and Solution Partner Path
records.affiliate_or_sales_path: Affiliate referral plus automation implementation services
records.target_buyer: Service businesses, contractors, MSPs, agencies, and operations teams needing workflow automation
records.pain_solved: Manual data entry, disconnected applications, slow lead routing, repetitive follow-up, and fragmented workflows
records.estimated_commission_or_price: 35% of referred subscription payments for 12 months, subject to current program terms
records.cost_required: $0 to evaluate; account and program approval required
records.content_angle: QR intake to CRM, alerts, document storage, and automated follow-up
risk_flags: Payout thresholds and delays may apply
records.recommended_action: Build one internal Make proof workflow, measure it, and prepare the application package
records.notes: Strong external automation implementation and recurring commission fit.

records.source: Jotform Agency Partner and affiliate program research
records.product_or_offer_name: Field Operations Template Library + Jotform Agency Partner
records.affiliate_or_sales_path: Owned template sales, configuration, implementation, recurring support, and approval-gated agency referral
records.target_buyer: Field-service companies, mechanics, IT providers, inspectors, low-voltage firms, MSPs, and contractors
records.pain_solved: Manual intake, incomplete documentation, missing photos, weak closeout, and disconnected customer records
records.estimated_commission_or_price: Proposed $49-$99 templates; $249-$499 configuration; $750-$1,500 implementation; partner compensation subject to current approved terms
records.cost_required: $0 for internal proof build; application approval required
records.content_angle: A complete real field job from QR intake through photos, signature, closeout, PDF record, and follow-up
risk_flags: Verify current compensation terms before claims
records.recommended_action: Build ten platform-neutral field forms and a Jotform-compatible demo; prepare but do not submit the agency application
records.notes: Highest priority external partner path because the owned template library remains sellable without partner acceptance.

records.source: n8n affiliate and workflow template research
records.affiliate_or_sales_path: Owned workflow templates, implementation, support, and approval-gated affiliate referral
records.target_buyer: Field-service companies, MSPs, contractors, mechanics, and small operations teams
records.pain_solved: Disconnected applications, repetitive data entry, slow lead routing, missed follow-up, and inconsistent alerts
records.estimated_commission_or_price: Proposed $49-$199 templates; $750-$2,500 implementation; $149-$499 monthly support; affiliate terms require current verification
records.cost_required: $0 using self-hosted/local proof environment and existing infrastructure
records.content_angle: Show intake creating a lead, Slack/email alert, approval task, follow-up, and pipeline update automatically
risk_flags: Keep self-hosted version current and hardened
Do not expose credentials or client data
records.recommended_action: Build three reusable internal workflows and package sanitized importable templates
records.notes: Strongest AI automation asset path; service and template revenue do not depend on affiliate acceptance.

records.source: Already Here LLC internal field-service finance workflow
records.product_or_offer_name: Field Service Profit & Job Cost Tracker
records.affiliate_or_sales_path: Direct spreadsheet/database product, customization, data import, reporting support, and accounting-software referral feeder
records.target_buyer: Technicians, mechanics, low-voltage contractors, haulers, MSP subcontractors, and small field-service companies
records.pain_solved: Owners track billed revenue but cannot see true profit after labor, mileage, materials, fees, taxes, rework, and unpaid balances
records.estimated_commission_or_price: $19-$39 basic; $59-$99 bundle; $199-$399 customized; $350-$750 setup; $49-$149 monthly reporting
records.cost_required: $0 using existing spreadsheet and database tools
records.content_angle: Show how the apparent profit on a real job changes when all direct and hidden costs are included
records.recommended_action: Build the internal tracker, validate it using completed Already Here jobs, and export a sanitized commercial version
records.notes: Fastest standalone digital product after the field intake pack.

records.product_or_offer_name: FreshBooks Referral + Job Profit Workflow Setup
records.affiliate_or_sales_path: Approval-gated affiliate referral combined with invoicing, expense, project, and reporting setup
records.target_buyer: Independent contractors, technicians, mechanics, consultants, IT providers, and small service companies
records.pain_solved: Disorganized invoices, delayed payments, weak expense tracking, and limited job profitability visibility
records.estimated_commission_or_price: Affiliate compensation subject to current terms; proposed $250-$750 setup plus monthly operational reporting
records.content_angle: A field job moving from estimate to time, expenses, invoice, payment, and profit review
risk_flags: Do not provide accounting or tax advice
records.recommended_action: Complete the Job Profit Tracker proof, map a FreshBooks-compatible workflow, and prepare but do not submit the application
records.notes: Secondary software layer supporting the owned Job Profit Tracker.
